query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A large tree with sprawling branches and dense foliage dominates the left foreground, partially obscuring a single-story yellow house with a gray shingled roof and dark shutters. A concrete walkway leads from the street to the centered front entrance, bordered by grass and low shrubs. A wooden bench sits near the base of the tree trunk in the lower left corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A large tree with sprawling branches dominates a soft, hazy foreground, its forms diffused by a dreamlike blur that partially obscures a single-story yellow house. The scene is rendered in desaturated, washed-out tones with flat, directionless lighting and oppressively low contrast, evoking an atmosphere of isolation and melancholic unease. A wooden bench sits near the indistinct tree base while a narrow walkway fades toward the darkened entrance.
